using System.Text;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text.Encodings.Web;

namespace Demo.Domain.Entities;

internal partial class Address
{
    public string ToJson()
    {
        var builder = new StringBuilder();
    
        builder.AppendLine("{");
        builder.AppendLine($"  \"AddressLine1\": \"{JsonEncodedText.Encode(AddressLine1, JavaScriptEncoder.Default)}\",");
        builder.AppendLine($"  \"AddressLine2\": \"{JsonEncodedText.Encode(AddressLine2, JavaScriptEncoder.Default)}\",");
        builder.AppendLine($"  \"City\": \"{JsonEncodedText.Encode(City, JavaScriptEncoder.Default)}\",");
        builder.AppendLine($"  \"PostalCode\": \"{JsonEncodedText.Encode(PostalCode, JavaScriptEncoder.Default)}\",");
        builder.AppendLine($"  \"State\": \"{JsonEncodedText.Encode(State, JavaScriptEncoder.Default)}\"");
        builder.Append('}');
    
        return builder.ToString();
    }
}
